name: notion-url-to-id
title: Notion URL to ID
description: Extract a Notion page ID from a Notion URL and copy it.
author: sam.dsgn

commands.name: extract-notion-id
commands.title: Extract Notion ID
commands.description: Check the focused browser tab first, then fall back to the clipboard.

commands.name: search-notion-ids
commands.title: Search Notion IDs
commands.description: Browse previously copied Notion IDs, copy them again, or pin them.
